Class Main

java.lang.Object
test.Main
public final class Main extends Object
Basic sanity tests for the primitives classes. The program performs a small set of runtime checks on the basic geometric primitives and on constructors of several geometry objects. The tests verify correctness of the main algebraic operations and several edge cases such as zero vectors and orthogonality. The program prints error messages only if a test fails. If no output appears, all tests succeeded.
Author:
Dan Zilberstein

  • Constructor Details

    • Main

      public Main()
      Default constructor to satisfy JavaDoc generator

  • Method Details

    • main

      public static void main()
      Entry point of the project's basic sanity tests. The program checks the core functionality implemented in the first stage. It is intended to be executed again in later stages, without modification, to verify that new code does not break the existing functionality.

    • rayTests

      private static void rayTests()
      Basic test for the Ray constructor. Verifies that the direction vector is normalized by the constructor.

    • pointTests

      private static void pointTests()
      Method for testing operations on points

    • pointDistancesTests

      private static void pointDistancesTests()
      Tests distance and distanceSquared operations of Point. Includes symmetry checks and consistency between the two methods.

    • vectorSingleOperationTests

      private static void vectorSingleOperationTests()
      Method for testing operations on single vector

    • vectorDoubleOperationTests

      private static void vectorDoubleOperationTests()
      Method for testing operations on two vectors

    • geometryConstructorTests

      private static void geometryConstructorTests()
      Basic constructor checks for geometry classes. At this stage most geometry constructors only store the given parameters. Therefore the tests verify mainly that objects can be created successfully. The only geometry that performs structural validation in its constructor is Polygon, which checks coplanarity, ordering and convexity. However, Polygon is supplied to the students already tested, therefore it is not tested here.
